subject: Super Saiyan warrior in a dynamic power stance surrounded by swirling pink-purple energy
description: A humanoid figure with spiked golden hair stands in a wide-legged power stance. The figure wears what appears to be dark battle armor. An intense swirl of pink, purple, and white energy surrounds the body, creating a vortex-like background. The golden spiked hair and armored bodysuit silhouette are clearly rendered even at this resolution. The pose communicates strength and dominance — feet planted, body upright.
foreground: golden-haired humanoid in dark battle armor, wide power stance amid swirling energy
background: swirling pink, purple, and white energy vortex
emotion: dominance and controlled power; planted stance, upright posture
